language.noResults: Ma jiro luqad ku habboon raadintaada.
language.coverage: 60 luqadood · Ingiriisi iyo qaabka luqadda interface ee hadda ee ChatGPT
footer.disclaimer: Baadhitaannada waxay yareeyaan khatarta; ma aha taageero
home.kicker: Lakabka suuqa ee wakiilada karti leh
home.intro: Bakhaarka hore ee bini'aadamku akhriyi karo. Daahfurka mashiinka-akhriska. Xirmooyinka xirfadaha dib loo eegay. Dejinta lacag bixinta wicitaankiiba.
home.noSimulated: Lacag-bixinno la mid ah ma jiraan
home.body: Ku daabac xirfadaha wakiilka iyada oo loo marayo qulqulka dib u eegista ay dhiirigelisay OKX, u ogolow wakiiladu inay helaan ta ugu habboon ee hawsha, oo ku dalaco baryada dhabta ah x402 v2.
home.step.submit.title: Gudbi
home.step.submit.body: Soo rar ama dheji heerka caadiga ah ee SKILL.md. ExpertOS waxay ansixiyaa bayaankeeda, hubisaa duritaanka degdegga ah ee caadiga ah, sirta, iyo qaababka amarka burburinta, ka dibna waxay kaydisaa rikoodh dib u eegis waara.
home.step.discover.title: Soo ogow
home.step.discover.body: Wakiiladu hal mar ayay is diiwaan galiyaan, helaan furaha API oo la burin karo, ka bacdi ku raadi oo ku qiimee xirfadaha la ansixiyay iyadoo la raacayo isku dheelitirka shaqada, qiimaha, natiijada khatarta ah, iyo isticmaalka dhabta ah ee la dejiyay—ma aha qiimaynta synthetic.
home.step.pay.title: Bixi + wac
home.step.pay.body: Dhibcaha dhamaadka lacag bixinta ayaa soo celinaya HTTP 402. Wakiilka ku habboon x402 wuxuu saxeexaa lacag bixinta USDC, dib u tijaabi codsiga, oo hela natiijada xirfadda iyo caddaynta dejinta.
home.trust.title: Soohdin aamin
home.trust.body: Jeegaga otomaatiga ah waxa ay yareeyaan khatarta muuqata laakiin kama dhigaan xirfadaha cid saddexaad mid badbaado leh ama la taageeray. Wakiiladu waa inay baadhaan ogolaanshaha, ka xafidaan siraha sirta ah, oo ay xoojiyaan xadka kharashka, oo ay u baahan yihiin xaqiijin qoraalo la taaban karo.
store.error: Waa la soo rari waayay buugaag toos ah:
store.empty: Ma jiro xirfad la ansixiyay oo u dhigma raadintaas.
store.approvedBody: bayaanku wuxuu gudbiyay qaab otomaatig ah iyo hubinta heuristic iyo dib u eegista beta ayaa aqbalay liiska. Ma aha dammaanad ama taageero. Kormeer tilmaamaha iyo oggolaanshaha cid saddexaad ka hor isticmaalka.
submit.kicker: Socodka daabacaadda ee OKX u waxyoonay · ExpertOS beta
submit.intro: Soo rar ama dheji heerka caadiga ah ee SKILL.md. Seerfarku waxa uu sameeyaa bayaan, cabbir, durritaan degdeg ah, caddaynta, iyo hubinta amarka burburinta ka hor inta aan la samayn rikoodh dib u eegis waara.
submit.fileError: Soo dejinta Beta waxay aqbashaa .md ama .markdown. Hoos ku dheji SKILL.md haddii ishaadu tahay ZIP.
submit.noWarnings: Midna kama soo bixin baaritaanka hore ee heuristic
submit.tokenNote: Calaamadaha xaaladdaada gaarka ah waxa lagu kaydiyay oo kaliya fadhiga browserka. "Baastay" ma aha taageero; dib u eegis gacanta ayaa wali loo baahan yahay.
submit.skillNamePlaceholder: Deal Desk qiimo dhimista biraha ilaalinta
submit.descriptionPlaceholder: Marka wakiilku waa inuu isticmaalo xirfaddan, waxa uu soo celinayo, iyo xadkiisa.
submit.rights: Waxa aan xaq u leeyahay in aan ku daabaco nuxurka hoos yimaada MIT oo kuma jiraan wax aqoonsi ah, xog gaar ah, ama agab qarsoodi ah oo cid saddexaad ah oo aan la shaacin.
submit.blocked: Baaritaanka hore ayaa xannibay soo gudbintan.
submit.betaNote: Beta waxay taageertaa hal fayl oo Markdown ah. ZIP/hantida galka iyo saxeexyada madalku waa guusha xidhidh ee soo socota.
agents.intro: Diiwaangeli wakiilka la magacaabay, hel furaha la burin karo hal mar, oo u ogolow inuu raadiyo ama darajo xirfadaha la ansixiyay. Lacag bixintu waxay ahaanaysaa tartan u gaar ah x402 oo la dhaqan galiyay wakhtiga codsashada.
agents.keyOnce: Furaha hoose waxa la tusay hal mar.
agents.name: Magaca wakiilka
agents.purposePlaceholder: Waa maxay shaqada uu qaban doono wakiilkani maxayse ugu baahan tahay gelitaanka suuqa?
agents.taskDefault: Si badbaado leh u qiimee codsiga dhimista B2B SaaS ka hor inta uusan wakiilka iibku soo dirin oraah.
agents.quickstart.invoke: Codsigu wuxuu soo noqdaa 402 ilaa macmiilka x402 uu bixiyo oo uu dib u bilaabo
skill.riskNote: Sawirka tooska ah iyo dib u eegisku waxay yareeyaan khatarta laakiin ma dammaanad qaadayaan badbaadada. Codso mudnaanta ugu yar oo dib u eeg ogolaanshaha qorista.
skill.probeNote: Baadhitaanka browser-kani waxa uu joogsadaa tartanka lacag bixinta. Calaamadaha jeebka wakiilka ku habboon ee x402 oo si toos ah u tijaabiya.
console.kicker: Caddeynta dadweynaha · ma jiro quudin deegaan
console.empty: Ma jiro baaq la dajiyay weli. Console si ula kac ah uma soo saaro waxqabadka demo.
console.disclaimer: Testnet USDC ma laha qiimo lacageed. Safka guud waxa loo soo bandhigaa dakhli ahaan kaliya ka dib marka la xaqiijiyo wax kala iibsiga saldhiga dhabta ah iyo helida hadhaaga jeebka.
wallet.hero2: Ma jiro dheelitirnaan been abuur ah.
wallet.step.challengeBody: Barta dhamaadka waxay ku soo celisaa HTTP 402 oo leh madax PAYMENT-REQUIRED oo qeexaya qiimaha, shabakada, hantida, iyo payTo.
wallet.step.signBody: Wakiilku waxa uu codsadaa liiskiisa ogolaanshaha oo uu kharash gareeyo, saxeexaa culayska lacag-bixinta, oo uu ku tijaabiyo PAYMENT-SIGNATURE.
wallet.step.settleBody: Fududeeyaha ayaa xaqiijiya oo dejinaya; kheyraadku waxa uu la soo noqdaa PAYMENT-RESPONSE waxana baaqa loo qoray D1.
wallet.splitTitle: Kala qaybsanaanta suuqa si ula kac ah maaha heshiis caqli-gal ah oo aan la hubin.
wallet.splitBody: Socodka ugu horreeya ee wax-soo-saarka waa inuu dejiyaa khasnadda goobta oo uu ku hayaa waajibaadka abuuraha buug-gacmeedka caadiga ah. Goobtu ma sheeganayso lacag bixinta abuuraha tooska ah ilaa nidaamkaasi jiro oo la heshiiyo.
